cherry_pick_conflict.output: List conflict files and code snippets, suggest resolution steps
steps: 1. Run git status to check conflict files
2. Run git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U to list all conflicting files
3. For each conflict file, analyze <<<<<<< HEAD, =======, >>>>>>> markers

test_failure.output: Locate failing test cases and error stacks, suggest fix direction
steps: 2. Locate failing test file and line number
3. Analyze error stack to find root cause

invalid_commit.output: Validate if commit ID exists, return error if not found

branch_not_exists.output: Validate if target branch exists, return error if not found

cherry_pick_workflow.step_3: Run test command (dazel test / pytest / make test)
cherry_pick_workflow.step_4: If tests pass: git push --force-with-lease origin HEAD:<target-branch>
cherry_pick_workflow.step_5: If tests fail: git reset --hard $SAVE_HEAD, switch back to original branch

slack_feedback_format.invalid_commit: Invalid commit ID: `{commit_id}`. Please verify and retry.
slack_feedback_format.branch_not_found: Branch not found: `{branch}`. Please check the branch name.
